business_ideas.idea: At-home blood testing kits (Everlywell); 35+ test types available.
STI testing kits delivered at home with telemedicine follow-up.
Food sensitivity testing via at-home sample collection.
Healthcare pricing transparency (fix costs upfront vs insurance).
Vertical integration of healthcare supply chain (testing + pharmacy).
Direct-to-consumer subscription healthcare without insurance middlemen.

predictions.text: Everlywell reached $40M sales year three, on path to $100M+.
Food sensitivity testing resonates deeply if used with elimination diet.
NPS of 60 (world-class is 80+) shows room for improvement.
Direct DTC models work when unit economics are profitable upfront.
Food allergy tests are often misused; need regulatory guardrails.
